title: Deploy application to Internet Computer mainnet

requirements.summary: Deploy the complete application (frontend and backend) to the Internet Computer mainnet and provide the live URL
acceptanceCriteria: Application is successfully deployed to Internet Computer mainnet
A public URL is generated and accessible
All functionality works on the deployed version including note uploads, photo capture, and About Me profile management
Internet Identity authentication works on the live deployment

file_operations.description: Update Internet Identity authentication configuration to use production environment settings for mainnet deployment, ensuring AuthClient is configured for the live mainnet URL
Update backend actor initialization to use mainnet canister IDs and production host configuration, ensuring proper connection to deployed backend canister
Verify production environment configuration and ensure all providers are properly initialized for mainnet deployment
Update base URL and meta tags to reflect production mainnet deployment URL once available
